dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 12-month return sign to determine direction. Entry conditions trigger based on whether 12-month returns are positive (LONG) or negative (SHORT). Exit conditions reverse when return sign flips. Hold period set to 30 days (approximately 1 month). The 'returns' indicator captures price momentum over the lookback period required by the strategy.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 12-month return sign to determine direction. Entry conditions trigger based on whether 12-month returns are positive (LONG) or negative (SHORT). Exit conditions reverse when return sign flips. Hold period set to 30 days (approximately 1 month). The 'returns' indicator captures price momentum over the lookback period required by the strategy.

source_rule_text: Buy TU futures when 12-month return is positive, sell when 12-month return is negative, and hold for exactly 1 month.
